task_description: Create comprehensive unit tests for src/lib/concerts.ts to achieve 80% code coverage. This library contains core concert business logic including CRUD operations, pagination, statistics, and spending aggregation.

acceptance_criteria.text: Unit tests achieve at least 80% code coverage for src/lib/concerts.ts
acceptance_criteria.what_needed: Set up Vitest and write comprehensive test suite covering 25+ exported functions

acceptance_criteria.text: Tests follow project testing patterns using Vitest (per TESTING.md)
acceptance_criteria.what_needed: Install Vitest, configure TypeScript support, set up Prisma mocking patterns

acceptance_criteria.text: All major functions and edge cases are tested (including pagination, filters, statistics)
acceptance_criteria.what_needed: Write test cases for CRUD operations, pagination (cursor-based), filters (user/band/city/year), statistics caching, spending aggregation, edge cases (duplicates, missing data)

acceptance_criteria.text: Tests pass and can run in watch mode
acceptance_criteria.what_needed: Add test/watch/coverage scripts to package.json, ensure tests run successfully

related_files.summary: Core concert business logic: CRUD operations, pagination (cursor-based), filters (user/band/city/year), statistics caching, spending aggregation. 25+ exported functions including getUserConcerts, createConcert, updateConcert, deleteConcert, getConcertsPaginated, getConcertStatistics, getUserTotalSpent. Uses Prisma for database access, transforms data for frontend consumption.
Prisma client singleton - needs to be mocked in tests
Database schema: Concert, UserConcert (junction), Band, Festival, ConcertBand (junction). Multi-tenant design with shared concerts and per-user attendance.

gap_analysis.description: No tests exist. Need to create test file src/lib/concerts.test.ts with comprehensive coverage for all 25+ exported functions.
No Vitest setup. Need to install vitest, @vitest/ui, configure vitest.config.ts, set up Prisma mocking, add tsconfig for test files.

Need comprehensive test cases: CRUD operations (create/update/delete with validation), pagination (cursor-based, forward/backward), filters (userId, username, bandSlug, city, year), statistics (caching with unstable_cache), edge cases (duplicate detection, missing data, null handling).
Add scripts: 'test', 'test:watch', 'test:coverage' using vitest commands. Ensure tests pass.

context7_lookups.query: test configuration with TypeScript, mocking Prisma client, coverage setup
test UI and watch mode setup

cve_scan.output: Found 2 moderate vulnerabilities in Next.js (16.1.6): unbounded postponed resume buffering DoS, null origin CSRF bypass

hot_spots: src/lib/concerts.ts (22 changes in 3 months - 5th most changed file)
